positive: A mystical, stylized owl perched on a crescent moon branch, bathed in soft neon glow and deep indigo twilight. The owl has intricate, geometric feather patterns in emerald green and sapphire blue, while the moon emits soft cosmic dust trails. The overall style is vaporwave cosmic maximalism, combining clean linework with ethereal glow. The composition should feature a powerful, centered silhouette of the owl and branches against a gradient nebula backdrop. Use strong contrast between the glowing subjects and the deep space background. Suitable for a large-scale apparel print, minimalist yet detailed.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, messy, low resolution, bad anatomy, noisy, cropped, extra limbs, logos, trademarks, blurry background
